title: Enable PITR on all Amplify Gen2 DynamoDB tables to satisfy Prowler finding
description: Implement backend.ts CDK overrides so every backend.data.resources.tables DynamoDB table has PITR enabled (35-day retention), then verify synth/typecheck for dashboard.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Started implementation: adding a single backend.ts loop over backend.data.resources.tables to enforce DynamoDB PITR (target 35 days) for all Amplify Gen2 tables, then running dashboard typecheck for validation.
